title: Write validation gateway skill contract
summary: Define validation-mode instructions for independent fresh-context checks of builds, audits, content proof, and task close decisions.

goal.outcome: Validation mode gives agents a deterministic no-mutation gateway contract with exact refs, audits, and proof requirements.
acceptance: `codewiki-validation` skill frontmatter triggers on validating feedback/documentation/planning/implementation builds, task close, graph/drift audit, publication, or fresh validator handoff.

Instructions state exact inputs, tools (`codewiki_state`, `codewiki_audit`, `codewiki_validation`, session handoff as needed), pass/fail/block semantics, required proof, task boundary gate, and no-mutation rule.
Output contract includes profile, build/source refs, audit refs, fresh_context/clean/content proof fields when required, and deterministic failed/blocking criteria.
non_goals: Do not perform compiler work or mutate canonical truth in validation mode.
Do not loosen existing validation policy.
verification: Inspect validation skill against validation-gateway spec.

delta.desired: Validation gateway skill blocks drift by demanding exact refs, audits, and proof before pass/closure.
delta.current: Validation guidance lacks full evidence fields and can under-specify fresh-context/content-proof requirements.
delta.closure: Validator mode is independent, deterministic, and production-ready.
